ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website content and purpose */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client organization associated with the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the website was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the website details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the website (e.g., active, paused, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website associated with the analytics data */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions recorded for the website */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the reported analytics data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analytics recording */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views recorded for the website */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors recorded for the website */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of visitors who leave the website after viewing only one page */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average time visitors spend on the website */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of visitors who complete a desired action */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of traffic (e.g., organic search, paid search, social media) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website for which permissions apply */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view the website data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can edit the website settings */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can delete website data */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can share website data with others */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
